name: Thai Salmon Brown Rice
intro: This quick salmon recipe is a pretty straightforward recipe. A store-bought dressing gives this healthy dish an enhanced flavor, without significantly lengthening the preparation time.
method: Brush with 1/4 cup dressing. Bake for 8-10 minutes at 400°F
Stir the rice with coriander and salt.
Divide rice mixture (Step 3) between 4 bowls. Add salmon, carrots, cabbage, and the remaining dressing onto each rice bowls.
